features.name: memory array declaration with indexed access
features.description: Code should include a memory array declaration with both packed and unpacked dimensions and indexed access in indexed expressions
features.snippet:
reg [3:0] memory [0:1];
always @(posedge CLK) memory[A1ADDR] = A1DATA;

features.name: blocking assignment to memory in clocked always block
features.description: Code should include a blocking assignment (=) to a memory element within a clocked always block

features.name: non-blocking assignment from memory in clocked always block
features.description: Code should include a non-blocking assignment (<=) from a memory element within a clocked always block

features.name: dual always block RAM with same clock
features.description: Code should include two separate always @(posedge clk) blocks where one block writes to memory and another block reads from memory, creating potential scheduling ambiguity

features.name: same-clock-edge RAM read-write to same address
features.description: Code should include a dual-port RAM where port A writes and port B reads the same memory location on the same clock edge, with potentially identical addresses
